name: Paid Alpha Room Agent
description: Creates a receipt-gated Telegram or Discord alpha room where users pay, verify a receipt, and unlock premium room access or signals.
degenPitch: Turn the alpha room into a receipt-gated tollbooth instead of a vibes-only group chat.
whatItDoes: Quotes paid access to a community alpha room.
Verifies receipts before granting access or posting premium signals.
Tracks unlocks with visible fee waterfalls and no backend custody.
feeBehavior: Visible builder fee and DNA 0.1% fee are shown before room unlock and bound to the receipt.
cursorPrompt: Build a Paid Alpha Room Agent using DNA x402. User requests access, the bot shows a quote, verifies receipt, unlocks room access or premium signal content, and never stores private keys or signs in the backend.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Paid Alpha Room Agent using DNA x402. User requests access, the bot shows a quote, verifies receipt, unlocks room access or premium signal content, and never stores private keys or signs in the backend.
exampleFlow: Bot unlocks room or premium signal
receiptProofBehavior: Fee waterfall is bound to the access receipt.
Paid retry avoids double charging for the same access grant.
